features: 🌱 Naturally Derived Formula – Gentle on skin, tough on dirt.
🌊 Ocean Breeze Fragrance – Invigorating coastal scent leaves hands smelling amazing.
🧴 Moisturising Clean – Keeps hands soft and hydrated after every wash.
🖐️ 500ml Size – 12 x 500ml Perfect for frequent use in busy households or workplaces.
✅ Dermatologically Tested – Safe for everyday use by the whole family.
🚫 No Harsh Chemicals – Free from parabens and unnecessary additives.
description: Product description Bring the refreshing scent of the sea to your daily handwashing routine with Belux Liquid Hand Soap Ocean Breeze. Crafted with naturally derived ingredients, this luxurious hand soap not only cleans effectively but also pampers your skin with a burst of coastal freshness. Ideal for both home and professional use! ✨ Key Features & Benefits: 🌱 Naturally Derived Formula – Gentle on skin, tough on dirt. 🌊 Ocean Breeze Fragrance – Invigorating coastal scent leaves hands smelling amazing. 🧴 Moisturising Clean – Keeps hands soft and hydrated after every wash. 🖐️ 500ml Size – 12 x 500ml Perfect for frequent use in busy households or workplaces. ✅ Dermatologically Tested – Safe for everyday use by the whole family. 🚫 No Harsh Chemicals – Free from parabens and unnecessary additives. Directions Apply a small amount of hand soap to wet hands. Lather well by rubbing hands together for at least 20 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with clean water and dry. Suitable for daily use. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with water. Keep out of reach of children unless under adult supervision. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a doctor. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. See more
